days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. A few thunderstorms by the end of the day. Force 4 to 5 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional Thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional Thundery showers. Force 4 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 4 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
